Alumni Network

The Program Ends. The Network Doesn't.

Hudson Lab alumni are building things. Startups, research projects, design studios, careers in venture capital — connected by a shared language for how to think about making something from nothing.

148
Alumni
4
Cities
23
Countries
12
Ventures Founded
3
Cohorts

Where They Are Now

Portrait
Product Track · NYC 2024

Sofia Morales

Product Design Intern → Full-time at a Series B health-tech startup

The two weeks didn't teach me product design. They taught me how to think about problems before I open Figma.

Sofia came in wanting to be a UX designer. She left understanding that product thinking starts upstream of the interface. Her Hudson Lab project became the portfolio piece that landed her an internship before senior year.

Business Track · Lisbon 2024

Daniel Kwon

Co-founder, a DTC food brand. Currently raising pre-seed.

Takeshi made me redo my unit economics four times. I hated it. Then I used that model to raise my first check.

Daniel didn't come from a business background. He was a biology major who liked cooking. The Business track gave him the language to turn a passion project into something fundable.

Portrait
Portrait
GTM Track · Seoul 2025

Anika Ramirez

Marketing Associate at a venture studio. Applying to MBA programs.

I learned more about how companies actually grow in two weeks than in three years of marketing courses.

Anika's launch campaign got real traction. She ran paid acquisition for a student wellness app and tracked the funnel end-to-end. The case study became the thing interviewers wanted to talk about.

The people I met at Hudson Lab think about building the same way I do. That matters more than any certificate.
Alumni, NYC 2024

What the Network Gives You

The program is two weeks. The network is permanent.

Alumni Directory

Find anyone from any cohort. Searchable by city, track, industry, and role.

Monthly Sessions

Live workshops and AMAs with operators. Topics rotate. Alumni-only.

Mentorship Matching

Paired with practitioners in your field. Matched by track and interest. Quarterly check-ins.

Venture Support

Building something? Office hours with founders, pitch feedback, investor introductions.
